rationale.R1.2: Identifies a key inconsistency in the framing and proposes a fix.
rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work (HTAP systems) but doesn't delve into specific comparisons.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and flow, removes redundancies.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty regarding the 'unified' claim and the lack of cross-session consistency guarantees.
rationale.RX.3: Stays within the scope of addressing the provided text.
rationale.RX.4: Does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some traceability but could benefit from more detailed annotations.
